causal_question: Did cities that adopted CompStat in 1994 experience a change in the share of total arrests that were minor (Part II) offenses from 1993 to 1995 relative to cities that had not yet adopted (1996+)?
vague_question: Did a city's adoption of CompStat around 1994 coincide with any change in the share of arrests that were for minor (Part II) offenses?
